message:
feat: replace per-element unravel/ravel axis reduction with contiguous kernel

Replace the O(n) unravel_index + ravel_index mapping in reduce_sum axis
path with an outer/axis/inner contiguous traversal kernel. This yields a
~90% latency reduction on axis-reduction workloads (p50 0.455ms -> 0.045ms)
and a 56% command-level mean improvement (22.9ms -> 10.1ms) with no API
or dtype contract changes.

Adds regression tests for non-last-axis ordering (axis=0, 3D) and
empty-axis zero-initialized outputs. Rebaselines benchmark snapshot and
conformance differential report.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
